dimensions.note: Docs-only change: corrected the selector-context Engine row wording in README.md. No credential paths or secrets touched.
No logging calls changed; the only source edit is the model version bump and a no-op upgrades entry.

No control flow changed. Verified against source: clusters are filtered by isRdsEngine (the four-engine allowlist) before selector contexts are built, so the selector-context Engine is always one of the allowlisted engines and never empty. README now states this correctly.
Documentation and a no-op version bump; existing typecheck, unit, quality, and dry-run gates continue to cover the scanner.
No method semantics changed; the scanner remains a read-only inventory that re-derives the same resources each run.
DescribeDBClusters/DescribeDBInstances usage and response mapping unchanged; no request/response shape touched.
No new files, handles, or network clients; the RDS client lifecycle is unchanged.
Manifest and exported model version aligned at 2026.07.19.0; no files added to the package surface.
Mechanical schema/write review: no schema or writeResource payload change; strict cluster/instance schemas retained.
Resource lifetime and garbage-collection settings unchanged.
Read-only scanner: it only enumerates existing RDS resources and has no create/update/delete lifecycle, so CRUD completeness does not apply; unchanged by a docs edit.
No mutating operations, so there is no destructive preflight to gate; the read-only scan requires none. Unchanged.
Mechanical instance-name review: no writeResource instance-name logic changed; cluster/instance resource naming preserved.
No readResource or dataRepository access patterns changed.

Added a no-op 2026.07.19.0 upgrade entry (upgradeAttributes returns old unchanged) so stored instances advance to the bumped model version with no globalArguments migration. Invariant holds: every version has a corresponding upgrade step.
